cap Console { fn log(msg: String): Unit }
fn f() { Console.log("hi") }
---
Cap(name="Console", ops=["log"])
Fn(name="f", body=Call(callee=Member(object=Variable("Console"), member="log"), args=[String("hi")]))
==========
fn f() { handle E with h in x }
---
Fn(name="f", body=Handle(cap="E", handler=Variable("h"), body=Variable("x")))
